title: Contact us
intro: Questions about our programs, partnerships, or how to get started? Send us a message — we're a small team and do our best to respond promptly.
pathSectionDescription: Community IP serves inventors, volunteers, partners, and funders. Use the path that fits you, or send a general message below.
instructions: For inventor support, use Apply for Help. For donations, visit our Support page or Spotfund campaign.
formSectionDescription: For general questions not covered by the paths above.
formNote: For inventor support, use Apply for Help. Submitting a form does not create an attorney-client relationship.
donateSupportText: Want to support our mission? Visit the Donate page or contribute directly via Spotfund.

formLabels.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will respond as soon as we can.
